audit_items.proof_trace: When blob_retention_epoch > fulu_fork_epoch, line 829 returns current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS without enforcing max(result, FULU_FORK_EPOCH). During the window where current_epoch < FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, the boundary can be set below FULU_FORK_EPOCH, violating the invariant.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Within 4096 epochs after Fulu fork (when blob_retention_epoch > fulu_fork_epoch but current_epoch - 4096 < fulu_fork_epoch), an attacker can send DataColumnsByRangeRequest for slots before FULU_FORK_EPOCH, requesting data that should not exist (pre-fork). This causes nodes to accept requests for invalid epoch ranges, potentially causing DoS or inconsistent sync state.
